column5: Angular red bricks and concrete fragments with some grey silty SAND and some domestic rubbish and steel fragments. (FILL)
Sub-rounded GRAVEL and COBBLES of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Strong to moderately strong, brownish grey spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees & 65 degrees-75 degrees.
